company.name: Cipla Ltd.
company.subtitle: Indian respiratory + complex generics specialist. FY25 (Mar25) revenue INR 277B / ~$3.3B. One-India ~44% (~$1.45B), North America ~28% (~$0.93B record gLanreotide), South Africa ~10%, Emerging Markets ~9%, Europe + API ~9%. Net cash $840M. Key US: gLanreotide depot (Mar 2024 launch). Pipeline: gAdvair, gAbraxane, gRevlimid (2026 ladder), peptide depots.

assets.name: gLanreotide Depot (lanreotide complex generic) - somatostatin analog peptide depot
assets.stage: Commercial (US launch Mar 2024; flagship complex generic)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: gLanreotide ~30% US lanreotide volume share post-launch

assets.name: Cipla One-India franchise (branded Rx + trade generics + consumer)
Cipla Emerging Markets ex-SA franchise (HIV ARV + LATAM + MENA + APAC)
gAdvair Diskus (fluticasone-salmeterol DPI complex generic)
assets.stage: Phase 3 / FDA review (CRL resolution expected CY2026)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: gAdvair ~10-15% Advair-class share post-launch (vs Wixela first-mover)
